---
name: Bug report
about: Something in a workflow didn't work as documented
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

**Which workflow?** (e.g. PK-03 Manual Dead Letter Replay)

**What did you do?**
The steps you followed.

**What happened?**
The error text or wrong behavior. Redact any secrets first.

**What did you expect?**

**Your setup**
- n8n: Cloud / self-hosted (version)
- Storage: Data Tables / Postgres

**Screenshots** (optional but very helpful)
